items.title_en: Elixir v1.20: Now a gradually typed language
items.title_zh: Elixir v1.20：逐步类型化语言
items.summary_en: Elixir 1.20 introduces gradual typing, letting developers opt into type checks without breaking dynamic code. This enables stronger tooling and safer APIs while preserving Elixir’s flexible, productive vibe.
items.summary_zh: Elixir 1.20 引入渐进式类型系统，开发者可以在不强制改动现有动态代码的前提下逐步打上类型标记。这提升工具链的准确性，帮助接口设计更安全，同时保留 Elixir 的灵活与高效开发体验。

items.title_en: Gemma 4 12B: A unified, encoder-free multimodal model
items.title_zh: Gemma 4 12B：一个统一的无需编码器的多模态模型
items.summary_en: Gemma 4 12B is Google's encoder-free, unified multimodal model designed to handle text, image, and other modalities with a single architecture. By removing dedicated encoders, it aims to simplify training and inference while enabling more flexible cross-modal tasks. This approach could lower engineering friction for developers building multimodal applications.
items.summary_zh: Gemma 4 12B 是谷歌推出的无编码器、统一的多模态模型，能够用同一架构处理文本、图像等模态。取消独立编码器的设计旨在简化训练和推理，为跨模态任务带来更大的灵活性。此类设计若成熟，可能降低多模态应用的工程门槛。

items.title_en: Meta workers can opt out of being tracked at work up to 30 min
items.title_zh: Meta 员工可在工作时最多不被追踪30分钟
items.summary_en: Meta has updated its employee monitoring policy to allow workers to opt out of being tracked for up to 30 minutes at a time. The change underscores the tension between productivity analytics and employee privacy in big tech.
items.summary_zh: Meta 更新员工监控政策，允许员工单次最多有30分钟不被追踪。此举凸显了大科技公司在生产力分析与员工隐私之间的权衡。

items.title_en: MacBook Neo Is So Popular That Apple Doubled Production
items.title_zh: MacBook Neo 火爆，苹果将产量翻倍
items.summary_en: The MacBook Neo has proven popular enough for Apple to double production, signaling strong demand for Apple Silicon laptops in 2026. It hints at supply chain resilience and the ongoing push to higher-performance, battery-friendly devices in premium markets.
items.summary_zh: MacBook Neo 需求强劲，苹果已将产量翻倍，反映出 2026 年对 Apple Silicon 笔记本的强劲需求。此举也揭示了供应链的韧性和高性能、长电池续航的高端笔记本市场热度。

items.title_en: Hacking your PC using your speaker without ever touching it
items.title_zh: Hacking your PC using your speaker without ever touching it
items.summary_en: Researchers demonstrate a BadUSB-style attack that uses a speaker to compromise a PC without any direct user interaction. The technique underlines how trusted hardware can be weaponized through subtle channels, raising concerns about supply chain, peripherals, and device authentication. It highlights the risk of peripheral-based exploits and the need for hardware-level defenses.
items.summary_zh: 研究人员展示了利用扬声器进行 BadUSB 式攻击、在无需任何直接交互的情况下入侵电脑的可能性。这一技巧暴露了受信任硬件可被通过微妙通道 weaponize 的风险，凸显了外设信任、供应链与硬件认证方面的挑战。

items.title_en: ESP32-S31
items.title_zh: ESP32-S31 芯片
items.summary_en: Espressif's ESP32-S31 expands the low-power IoT SoC family with a focus on security and edge ML. The platform aims to deliver more secure, capable microcontrollers for smart devices, sensors, and wearables, broadening opportunities for on-device AI and encryption. As edge computing grows, S31 chips may accelerate privacy-preserving smart products.
items.summary_zh: Espressif 推出 ESP32-S31，扩展低功耗物联网系统芯片家族，强调安全性并支持边缘机器学习。该平台为智能设备、传感器和穿戴设备提供更安全、功能更强的微控制器，推动就地 AI 与加密能力。随着边缘计算兴起，S31 可能加速隐私保护型智能产品的落地。

items.title_en: The Public Should Own Half of the Big A.I. Companies
items.title_zh: 公众应该拥有大 AI 公司的一半
items.summary_en: The op-ed argues for public ownership or heavy public stake in major AI companies to curb power concentration and shape governance. It frames a policy debate about capitalism, innovation, and national strategy in AI.
items.summary_zh: 这篇社论呼吁公众在大型 AI 公司中占有半数股份，以遏制权力集中并影响治理。它将资本主义、创新与国家 AI 发展策略等议题推向政策辩论。

items.title_en: DaVinci Resolve 21
items.title_zh: 达芬奇 Resolve 21
items.summary_en: DaVinci Resolve 21 bundles improved color tools, performance, and cloud-friendly collaboration, with AI-assisted features that appeal to prosumers and studios alike.
items.summary_zh: DaVinci Resolve 21 包含更强的色彩工具、性能提升及云端协作功能，并新增 AI 支持特性，适合专业与准专业工作流。

items.title_en: I was recently diagnosed with anti-NMDA receptor encephalitis
items.title_zh: 我最近被诊断患上抗 NMDA 受体脑炎
items.summary_en: A personal account of being diagnosed with anti-NMDA receptor encephalitis, a rare autoimmune condition that can mimic psychiatric illness. The post emphasizes the difficulty of correct diagnosis and the importance of awareness among clinicians and patients. It sheds light on the intersection of neurology and mental health.
items.summary_zh: 作者分享罕见的抗 NMDA 受体脑炎诊断经历，这种疾病常因症状类似精神疾病而误诊。文章强调正确诊断的难度，以及提高临床与患者对该病的认知重要性，彰显神经科与精神健康的交叉议题。

items.title_en: Bot vs human traffic
items.title_zh: 机器人 vs 人类流量
items.summary_en: Cloudflare's radar shows ongoing trends in bot and human traffic, including volumes, detection methods, and attack vectors. The implications touch security, fraud prevention, content moderation, and performance optimization as sites increasingly rely on automated traffic.
items.summary_zh: Cloudflare 的流量雷达揭示了机器人与真人流量的持续趋势、检测手段及攻击向量。结果对站点安全、防欺诈、内容治理与性能优化具有重要意义，特别是在自动化流量日益增多的场景。

items.title_en: 32GB of DDR5 now costs $375 – AI shortage continues to squeeze PC building
items.title_zh: 32GB DDR5现价375美元—AI短缺持续挤压PC组装成本
items.summary_en: DDR5 memory for 32GB modules has risen to around $375, reflecting AI-driven demand pressures. The price squeeze affects DIY PC builders and smaller workloads, nudging buyers toward different configurations.
items.summary_zh: 32GB DDR5 内存现价约375美元，反映 AI 相关需求的上行压力。价格紧缩影响 DIY PC 构建者与小型工作负载，推动用户调整为其他配置。

items.title_en: Artificial intelligence is not conscious – Ted Chiang
items.title_zh: 人工智能并非具备意识——Ted Chiang
items.summary_en: Ted Chiang argues that current AI lacks true consciousness and subjective experience; he distinguishes between sophisticated pattern recognition and genuine sentience. The piece further explores ethical and policy implications, urging careful framing of AI capabilities and responsibilities.
items.summary_zh: Ted Chiang 认为当前的人工智能并非真正具备意识或主观体验；它们只是高度复杂的模式识别系统。文章还讨论伦理与政策含义，呼吁对 AI 能力与责任进行谨慎界定。

items.title_en: A Post-Quantum Future for Let's Encrypt
items.title_zh: Let's Encrypt 的后量子时代
items.summary_en: Let's Encrypt outlines a plan for a post-quantum TLS ecosystem, including preparing for quantum-resistant certificates and hybrid crypto approaches. The move reflects the broader industry shift toward quantum-safe web security and the need for gradual crypto migrations without breaking existing sites.
items.summary_zh: Let’s Encrypt 发布后量子时代路线图，计划为 TLS 引入抗量子证书并采用混合加密策略。此举反映了行业向量子安全的转型，以及在不破坏现有网站的前提下逐步完成加密迁移的必要性。

items.title_en: Gooey: A GPU-accelerated UI framework for Zig
items.title_zh: Gooey：用于 Zig 的 GPU 加速 UI 框架
items.summary_en: Gooey is a GPU-accelerated UI framework for Zig, offering high-performance rendering while staying language-friendly. It signals growing interest in GPU-accelerated UI toolchains outside mainstream JS frameworks and could enable more responsive, graphics-heavy apps built in Zig.
items.summary_zh: Gooey 是面向 Zig 的 GPU 加速 UI 框架，提供高性能渲染并保持语言友好性。它体现了在非主流语言生态中对 GPU 加速 UI 工具链的兴趣，或推动用 Zig 构建更流畅、图形密集型的应用。

items.title_en: I built a ceiling projection mapping of the planes flying over my house
items.title_zh: 我在自家屋顶上做了天花板投影映射，展示经过的航班
items.summary_en: A maker project projecting the flight path overhead via ceiling projection mapping, blending computer vision, projection mapping, and urban curiosity. It showcases how accessible creative tech can turn everyday visibility into art and data visualization.
items.summary_zh: 一个创客项目，利用天花板投影将头顶的航班路径可视化，融合计算机视觉、投影映射与城市好奇心。展示了可访问的创意科技如何把日常可见性转化为艺术与数据可视化。

items.title_en: Uber's $1,500/month AI limit is a useful signal for AI tool pricing
items.title_zh: Uber 将 AI 工具使用额度设定为每月 1500 美元，为定价提供信号
items.summary_en: Uber caps AI tool usage at $1,500 per month, a concrete pricing signal for enterprise AI tooling. The cap affects individual power users and teams alike, influencing how startups and enterprises budget for copilots, assistants, and automation. It underscores the market’s sensitivity to costs and value at scale.
items.summary_zh: Uber 将 AI 工具使用额度设定为每月 1500 美元，为企业级 AI 工具定价提供了明确信号。该上限影响个人与团队的使用成本，促使初创公司与企业在成本与价值之间权衡。

items.title_en: Gmail thinks I'm stupid, so I left
items.title_zh: Gmail 觉得我很蠢，所以我离开
items.summary_en: A writer explains leaving Gmail after experiences with AI-powered features and UX choices that felt intrusive.
items.summary_zh: 作者在体验到 Gmail 的 AI 功能和设计带来的侵入感后选择离开。文章讨论用户对 AI 助手驱动的邮箱服务的抵触情绪，以及隐私、控制权与 UX 设计之间的权衡。

items.title_en: Angular v22
items.title_zh: Angular v22 发布
items.summary_en: Angular v22 ships with framework refinements, improved performance, and ergonomics for developers, along with updates to tooling and standards alignment. The release signals ongoing maturation of a legacy-spanning front-end ecosystem.
items.summary_zh: Angular v22 版本带来框架优化、性能提升和开发者体验改进，并伴随工具链与标准对齐的更新，体现前端生态的持续成熟。

items.title_en: Every Byte Matters
items.title_zh: 每一个字节都很重要
items.summary_en: Every byte counts in modern systems, affecting latency, energy use, privacy, and costs. The piece argues for smarter data practices as a competitive advantage.
items.summary_zh: 在现代系统中，每一个字节都至关重要，关系到延迟、能耗、隐私和成本。文章主张通过更高效的数据实践获得竞争优势。

items.title_en: PlayStation Architecture
items.title_zh: PlayStation 架构
items.summary_en: PlayStation architecture deep dive reveals Sony’s hardware choices across CPU, GPU, memory, and IO, with implications for game performance, dev tooling, and platform longevity.
items.summary_zh: PlayStation 架构的深入解析揭示了索尼在 CPU/GPU、内存和 I/O 等方面的硬件取舍，对游戏性能、开发工具链和平台生命周期有重要影响。

items.title_en: Show HN: Nutrepedia – Nutrition info in 29 locales built with Clojure and Htmx
items.title_zh: Nutrepedia：29 个地区的营养信息，采用 Clojure 与 Htmx 构建
items.summary_en: Nutrepedia is a multilingual nutrition database built with Clojure and Htmx, showcasing a Show HN-worthy stack that emphasizes approachable data, localizations, and accessible UI. The project highlights how open data and modern web tech can empower people to compare nutrition information across locales.
items.summary_zh: Nutrepedia 是一个用 Clojure 与 Htmx 构建的多语种营养信息数据库，展示了易于使用的数据与本地化界面。该项目体现了开源数据和现代网页技术如何让用户跨地区比较营养信息。

items.title_en: Shopify outage [resolved]
items.title_zh: Shopify 故障（已解决）
items.summary_en: Shopify outage shows how e-commerce platforms must balance reliability, incident response, and customer communications. The resolution provides lessons for developers building and operating critical online storefronts.
items.summary_zh: Shopify 故障揭示了电子商务平台在可靠性、事件响应与对客户沟通方面的挑战。解决过程为开发者在构建和运营关键线上商店时提供了经验。

items.title_en: Launch HN: Hyper (YC P26) – Company brain to power agentic development
items.title_zh: Launch HN：Hyper（YC P26）——推动代理式开发的公司大脑
items.summary_en: Hyper, a YC P26 alumnus, positions itself as a 'company brain' to power agentic development—orchestrating AI agents across an organization. The platform aims to turn corporate data, workflows, and governance into actionable autonomous capabilities, reducing manual toil for developers and operators. It signals a shift toward toolchains that manage AI agents at scale.
items.summary_zh: Hyper（YC P26）定位为“公司大脑”，用于驱动代理式开发并在组织层面编排 AI 代理。该平台将企业数据、工作流与治理转化为可执行的自主能力，帮助开发者与运维人员减轻重复性工作。预示着面向大规模 AI 代理的工具链正在成形。

items.title_en: Rootshell: A new E2EE email service hosted in Iceland
items.title_zh: Rootshell：在冰岛托管的端对端加密邮件服务
items.summary_en: Rootshell launches a new E2EE email service hosted in Iceland, emphasizing privacy, jurisdiction, and data protection. It likely uses end-to-end encryption by default, with considerations about metadata, accessibility, and self-contained servers.
items.summary_zh: Rootshell 推出在冰岛托管的端对端加密邮件服务，突显隐私保护与地理管辖的优势。默认采用端对端加密，需关注元数据暴露与服务器自托管等细节。

items.title_en: The newest Instagram “exploit” is the goofiest I've seen
items.title_zh: Instagram 最新漏洞是我见过的最离谱的
items.summary_en: Instagram's latest vulnerability demonstrates an embarrassingly simple route to an account takeover, exposing gaps in auth flows. The incident highlights how even large platforms struggle with secure access controls and abuse monitoring.
items.summary_zh: 最新的 Instagram 漏洞暴露出一个极其简单的账号接管路径，凸显身份验证流程的薄弱。即使是大平台也难免在防护和滥用监测方面出现漏洞。

items.title_en: Building iOS Apps with Doom Emacs
items.title_zh: 用 Doom Emacs 构建 iOS 应用
items.summary_en: A developer documents a workflow for building iOS apps using Doom Emacs, highlighting the Unix-friendly text editor as a viable IDE alternative. It covers integration with Xcode tooling, Swift development, and potential tradeoffs in debugging and project setup.
items.summary_zh: 作者分享了使用 Doom Emacs 构建 iOS 应用的工作流，展示这款轻量编辑器在移动开发中的可行性与潜力。文章探讨与 Xcode 流水线的整合、Swift 开发以及调试和项目配置的取舍。

items.title_en: Embryos shape their limbs: a key discovery of "genetic brakes"
items.title_zh: 胚胎成形肢体：遗传“刹车”机制的关键发现
items.summary_en: Researchers uncover how embryos shape limb development through genetic brakes that prevent overgrowth or mispatterning. The finding helps explain robust development and could inform regenerative medicine or congenital limb disorders. It highlights the programmable brakes as essential to morphogenesis.
items.summary_zh: 研究揭示胚胎在肢体发育中通过“遗传刹车”来控制形态，避免过度生长或模式错位。此发现有助于理解发育的鲁棒性，并可能为再生医学和先天性肢体疾病的研究带来新线索。

items.title_en: Use your Nvidia GPU's VRAM as swap space on Linux
items.title_zh: 在 Linux 上将 Nvidia GPU 的 VRAM 用作交换空间
items.summary_en: A Linux tool exposes Nvidia GPU VRAM as a swap device via NBD, letting systems swap to GPU memory under memory pressure. It's a niche hack that can extend usable RAM on GPUs with large VRAM but performance depends on workload and memory bandwidth. Not a replacement for main RAM, but a clever hack for specific workloads.
items.summary_zh: 一款 Linux 工具通过 NBD 将 Nvidia GPU 的 VRAM 暂时作为交换空间使用。对于显存较大的显卡来说，在内存压力时可以延迟将数据写入磁盘，但它并非主 RAM 的替代品，性能取决于 workload 与带宽。

items.title_en: New Texas Instruments 5532 chips are not the 5532s we’ve used for decades
items.title_zh: 新型号 TI 5532 芯片并非我们几十年来用过的那类
items.summary_en: New TI 5532 chips reportedly differ from classic 5532s, impacting audio electronics, requiring designers to verify specs, consider substitutes, and reassess performance expectations.
items.summary_zh: 据报道，新款 TI 5532 与几十年前的型号存在差异，可能影响音频电子设计，需要设计师核对规格、考虑替代方案并重新评估性能。

items.title_en: AI outperforms law professors in Stanford Law study
items.title_zh: AI 在斯坦福法学院研究中超越法学教授
items.summary_en: A Stanford study finds AI models outperform law professors on certain tasks, highlighting AI’s growing capabilities in legal reasoning and research. The result raises questions about law-school pedagogy and underscores the need for guardrails and human judgment.
items.summary_zh: 斯坦福法学院的一项研究显示，在某些法律任务中，AI 的表现可与甚至超过法学教授，凸显了法律推理与检索能力的快速提升，同时也强调治理与人类监督的重要性。

items.title_en: MAI-Code-1-Flash
items.title_zh: MAI Code-1 快闪
items.summary_en: Microsoft unveils MAI Code-1-Flash, a compact addition to the MAI code-generation lineup. The release emphasizes fast, integrated coding assistance designed to fit into developer workflows without overwhelming users. It signals Microsoft’s push toward lightweight, in-editor AI tools for everyday programming.
items.summary_zh: 微软发布 MAI Code-1-Flash，作为 MAI 代码生成家族的一员，强调在开发者工作流中快速、无缝的编码协助。此举显示微软在将 AI 工具嵌入到日常编码任务中的持续投入，关注轻量化与易用性。

items.title_en: 1-Click GitHub Token Stealing via a VSCode Bug
items.title_zh: 通过 VSCode 漏洞的一键式 GitHub 令牌窃取
items.summary_en: A VSCode bug exposes GitHub tokens with a single click, enabling token theft via the IDE’s authentication flow. The incident underscores the risk of embedded auth in development tools and token-scoping hygiene; users should rotate tokens, enable 2FA, and update to patched versions.
items.summary_zh: VSCode 中的一个漏洞使攻击者能够在一次点击中窃取 GitHub 访问令牌，利用集成的认证流程进行攻击。这一事件暴露了开发工具中嵌入式认证的风险以及令牌作用域带来的安全隐患。用户应轮换令牌、启用两步验证并更新到修补版本，同时谨慎管理令牌权限。

items.title_en: Brume is a 24-voice multi-timbral desktop synth for the CM5
items.title_zh: Brume：为 CM5 提供的 24 声部桌面合成器
items.summary_en: Brume debuts as a 24-voice multi-timbral desktop synth built for the CM5, enabling layering of multiple patches with independent MIDI channels. The device targets studio and live players seeking compact, flexible hardware with desktop ergonomics.
items.summary_zh: Brume 推出一款面向 CM5 的桌面合成器，支持 24 声部多 timbral，让用户在同一机身上叠加多个声音并各自分配 MIDI 通道。体积紧凑、适合工作室和舞台使用，强调桌面化的便携与灵活性。

items.title_en: Mathematicians issue warning as AI rapidly gains ground
items.title_zh: Mathematicians issue warning as AI rapidly gains ground
items.summary_en: Mathematicians warn that AI progress is accelerating beyond current theory and verification methods. The piece calls for deeper mathematical foundations for AI safety, formal verification, and robust governance as models scale. The takeaway is a push for rigorous math to back reliable AI deployment.
items.summary_zh: 数学家警告人工智能的进展正在快速超出现有理论与验证手段的能力。文章呼吁在 AI 安全、形式化验证和治理方面建立更扎实的数学基础，以应对大规模模型带来的新挑战。

items.title_en: CT scans of BYD car parts
items.title_zh: 比亚迪汽车部件的 CT 扫描
items.summary_en: High-resolution CT scans reveal internal features and potential manufacturing artifacts in BYD car parts, showcasing the power of non-destructive imaging for QA and design. Such scans help engineers verify tolerances and spot hidden defects without disassembly, enabling faster QA and reverse engineering.
items.summary_zh: 高分辨率的 CT 扫描揭示了比亚迪汽车部件的内部结构与潜在制造缺陷，展现出无损成像在 QA 与设计优化中的作用。此类扫描帮助工程师核验公差、发现隐藏的制造痕迹，并在不拆解部件的情况下推进逆向工程。

items.title_en: Adafruit receives demand letter from Fenwick legal counsel on behalf of Flux.ai
items.title_zh: Adafruit 收到 Flux.ai 代表的 Fenwick 律师事务所律师函
items.summary_en: Adafruit reports receiving a formal demand letter from Fenwick & West on behalf of Flux.ai, signaling a potential IP or licensing dispute. The letter underscores how IP questions can affect hobbyist hardware vendors and the broader open-source hardware ecosystem. Readers should watch for updates on how Adafruit responds and what this means for developers and retailers shipping AI-enabled hardware.
items.summary_zh: Adafruit 表示收到了 Flux.ai 代表的 Fenwick 律师事务所发出的正式函件，暗示可能存在知识产权或许可方面的争议。此类函件凸显了知识产权问题对爱好者硬件厂商及开源硬件生态的潜在影响。请关注 Adafruit 的回应及此事对开发者和销售 AI 硬件的影响。

items.title_en: Tesla retroactively added 'supervised' to FSD contracts owners signed years ago
items.title_zh: 特斯拉回溯性地在 FSD 合同中加入‘受监督’
items.summary_en: Tesla retroactively added 'supervised' to FSD contracts, altering the user agreement to require supervision for autonomy. The move raises questions about consumer rights, software liability, and the evolving definition of driver assistance.
items.summary_zh: 特斯拉回溯性地在 FSD 合同中加入“受监督”条款，要求在自动驾驶情况下需要监督。此举引发关于消费者权利、软件责任和驾驶辅助定义演变的讨论。

items.title_en: A Man Who Reads Books for a Living (One Every Two Days)
items.title_zh: 以读书为职业：平均两天一本的阅读人生
items.summary_en: The piece profiles a professional reader who consumes a book roughly every two days, exploring what such a job entails, the discipline, and how constant reading shapes knowledge work. It offers reflections on the value of deep reading and the human labor behind curation.
items.summary_zh: 本文介绍一位以读书为生的职业读者，约两天就读完一本书，探讨这份工作的日常、所需的专注力以及持续阅读如何影响知识工作。也反映了深度阅读的价值和书目筛选背后的劳动。

items.title_en: What I've learned about the trombone
items.title_zh: 我对长号学到的经验
items.summary_en: A reflective piece on learning the trombone shares practical habits for mastering a musical instrument—patience, deliberate practice, and seeking feedback. The author's approach offers transferable insights into learning fast-moving technical skills.
items.summary_zh: 这篇关于学习长号的反思文章分享了练习耐心、精确练习和积极反馈等实用习惯。作者的学习方法也能为掌握快速迭代的技术技能提供可迁移的启示。

items.title_en: Show HN: Ideogram 4.0 – open-weight 9.3B text-to-image model
items.title_zh: Show HN：Ideogram 4.0——开源权重的 9.3B 文图模型
items.summary_en: Ideogram 4.0 releases open-weight 9.3B text-to-image model, advancing accessible, community-driven AI art generation. The open weights enable researchers and hobbyists to run and fine-tune the model locally, fostering experimentation and transparency.
items.summary_zh: Ideogram 4.0 发布开源权重的 9.3B 文图模型，推动了更易获取的 AI 艺术生成。开源权重使研究者和爱好者能够本地运行与微调模型，促进实验与透明度。

items.title_en: The Unreasonable Redundancy of Nature's Protein Folds
items.title_zh: 自然蛋白折叠的冗余性超出直觉
items.summary_en: Natural protein folds show redundancy beyond what intuition suggests; many sequences converge on a small set of folds. The finding has implications for how we model evolution, design novel proteins, and predict structures.
items.summary_zh: 自然界蛋白折叠的冗余性超出直觉预期，许多序列趋向于同一小组折叠。该发现影响我们对进化建模、蛋白质设计以及结构预测的理解。

items.title_en: SpaceX's IPO is a disaster waiting to happen for your pension fund
items.title_zh: SpaceX 的上市对养老金基金而言是潜在灾难
items.summary_en: Analyses warn SpaceX's ambitious debt load and earnings outlook could make an IPO risky for pension funds and other long-horizon investors. It highlights the tension between ambitious, long-term projects and traditional risk budgets.
items.summary_zh: 分析指出 SpaceX 的高负债与盈利前景让上市对养老金基金等长期投资者存在潜在风险，揭示雄心勃勃的项目与传统风险预算之间的矛盾。

items.title_en: Leiden Declaration on Artificial Intelligence and Mathematics
items.title_zh: Leiden Declaration on Artificial Intelligence and Mathematics
items.summary_en: Leiden Declaration on Artificial Intelligence and Mathematics calls for closer collaboration between AI and mathematics communities to ground AI advances in math-based theory, reproducibility, and ethics. It champions rigorous foundations as AI scales.
items.summary_zh: 《莱顿宣言》倡议 AI 与数学界加强协作，以数学理论、可重复性与伦理为基础約束 AI 的发展。

items.title_en: Pluto.jl 1.0 release – reactive notebook for Julia
items.title_zh: Pluto.jl 1.0 发布：面向 Julia 的反应式笔记本
items.summary_en: Pluto.jl 1.0 delivers a reactive notebook for Julia with dependency-aware execution and reproducibility. The release lowers the barrier to interactive data exploration and teaching in Julia.
items.summary_zh: Pluto.jl 1.0 推出，提供面向 Julia 的完全反应式笔记本，具备对依赖关系的自动跟踪与可重复执行性。该版本降低了交互式数据探索的门槛，便于教学与研究使用。

items.title_en: Show HN: Rscrypto, pure-Rust crypto with industry leading public benches
items.title_zh: Show HN: Rscrypto，纯 Rust 的密码学库，具行业领先的公开基准
items.summary_en: Rscrypto is a pure-Rust cryptography library with public benchmarks, aiming for transparent, verifiable performance. The project appeals to security-conscious developers who want reliable crypto in Rust without vendor-specific optimizations.
items.summary_zh: Rscrypto 是一个纯 Rust 的密码学库，提供公开的基准以实现透明可核验的性能。该项目面向重视安全性的开发者，追求在 Rust 中获得可靠且可验证的加密功能。

items.title_en: Show HN: Mnemo – local-first AI memory layer for any LLM (Rust, SQLite,petgraph)
items.title_zh: Mnemo：本地优先的 AI 记忆层，面向任意大型语言模型（Rust、SQLite、petgraph）
items.summary_en: Mnemo provides a local-first memory layer for LLMs, enabling on-device or local-then-sync memory storage using Rust, SQLite, and petgraph. This approach improves privacy and latency and can reduce reliance on external vector databases. It could become a building block for offline-capable AI apps.
items.summary_zh: Mnemo 为 LLM 提供本地优先的记忆层，利用 Rust、SQLite 和 petgraph 实现本地存储并可与云端同步。提高隐私与低延迟，降低对外部向量数据库的依赖，有望成为离线 AI 应用的基础组件。

items.title_en: U of T researchers demonstrate AI worm could target any online device
items.title_zh: U of T researchers demonstrate AI worm could target any online device
items.summary_en: Researchers demonstrate an AI-powered worm that could adaptively target online devices, illustrating how autonomous malware might evolve to map networks and exploit vulnerabilities. The result underscores the need for robust device hardening and proactive security updates. It’s a wake-up call for securing IoT and networked endpoints.
items.summary_zh: 研究人员展示了一种 AI 驱动的蠕虫，能够自适应地定位并攻击在线设备，演示了自治型恶意软件如何在网络中自我进化。该成果凸显对设备加固和主动安全更新的迫切需求。

items.title_en: It is an amazing time for programmers
items.title_zh: It is an amazing time for programmers
items.summary_en: Developers are thriving in a remarkably capable era thanks to modern languages, rich tooling, and AI copilots. The post argues these advances dramatically cut boilerplate, raise abstraction levels, and enable more ambitious projects with less friction. It’s a celebration of tooling-driven productivity.
items.summary_zh: 作者认为如今是程序员的黄金时代，得益于强大的语言生态、丰富的工具链和 AI 辅助开发。这些进步显著降低重复性工作、提升抽象层级，让人们能够更高效地开展更大胆的项目。

items.title_en: My thoughts after using Clojure for about a month
items.title_zh: 用了一个月 Clojure 的心得
items.summary_en: After a month using Clojure, the author notes a productive REPL-driven workflow and powerful macro system, but warns about onboarding friction for teams and the Java interop pitfalls. Clojure shines for concise, data-driven code yet demands discipline to maintain readability.
items.summary_zh: 作者用一个月的时间体验 Clojure，认为 REPL 驱动的工作流高效、宏系统强大，但对团队协作和 Java 互操作的学习成本需谨慎。Clojure 在数据驱动、简洁代码方面表现突出，但要保持代码可维护性需自律。

items.title_en: Show HN: Edsger – A handwritten Clojure REPL for the reMarkable 2
items.title_zh: Show HN：在 reMarkable 2 上运行的手写 Clojure REPL（Edsger）
items.summary_en: An experimental project ships a handwritten Clojure REPL on the reMarkable 2, letting you type and evaluate Clojure code directly on the e-ink device. It demonstrates how lightweight, on-device tooling can enable interactive programming far from a traditional IDE, even on constrained hardware. Proof-of-concept for embedding REPLs on unusual hardware.
items.summary_zh: 该项目把 Clojure 的手写 REPL 移植到 reMarkable 2，让在电子墨水设备上直接输入并执行代码成为可能。它展示了在资源受限设备上实现交互式编程的潜力，以及在极简硬件上的在地开发工具。

items.title_en: The advertising cartel coming to your web browser
items.title_zh: 广告寡头将进入你的网页浏览器
items.summary_en: A provocative analysis argues that ad tech cartels are consolidating control at the browser level, raising concerns about privacy, interoperability, and user experience.
items.summary_zh: 一篇分析指出广告科技寡头正在浏览器层面形成更强的垄断，带来隐私、互通性和用户体验方面的担忧。文章探讨浏览器厂商与监管者可能采取的对策。

items.title_en: A blueprint for democratic governance of frontier AI
items.title_zh: 面向前沿 AI 的民主治理蓝图
items.summary_en: OpenAI outlines a blueprint for democratic governance of frontier AI, proposing mechanisms to coordinate safety, accountability, and shared benefits across stakeholders. It argues for governance that scales with capability, involving policymakers, researchers, and civil society.
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 提出面向前沿 AI 的民主治理蓝图，建议建立跨利益相关方的协作机制以推动安全、问责和共享收益。治理框架强调随能力提升进行扩展，包含决策者、研究者与公民社会的参与。

items.title_en: I believe a whole generation of developers miss how open source used to work
items.title_zh: 我相信一整代开发者错过了开源曾经的运作方式
items.summary_en: A critique arguing that a generation of developers misses how open source used to work, touching on governance, licensing, and community norms of earlier OSS.
items.summary_zh: 作者认为新一代开发者错过了开源早期的运作方式，涉及治理、许可与社区规范等历史经验。

items.title_en: Roku LT Operating System open source distribution
items.title_zh: Roku LT 操作系统开源发行
items.summary_en: Roku released LT OS as open source, allowing developers to inspect, modify, and contribute to the streaming OS. The move could spur security hardening and experimentation, expanding the ecosystem beyond official devices.
items.summary_zh: Roku 发布了 LT OS 的开源发行，开发者可以审计、修改并向社区贡献。这一举措有望推动安全改进和创新，扩展生态系统，甚至可能促进自定义设备的发展。

items.title_en: Trump signs downsized AI order after weeks of reversals
items.title_zh: 特朗普在多周变动后签署缩减版 AI 命令
items.summary_en: Trump signs a downsized AI order after weeks of reversals, signaling a pared-back but still strategic stance on AI governance. The move focuses on national security, workforce reskilling, and research priorities.
items.summary_zh: 特朗普在多轮改变后签署了一份缩减版的 AI 指令，尽管规模减小，但仍体现对 AI governance 的战略关注，聚焦国家安全、劳动力再培训与研究优先级。

items.title_en: HP re-releases classic computer science calculator: The HP-16C
items.title_zh: HP 重新推出经典计算器：HP-16C 收藏版
items.summary_en: HP re-releases the classic HP-16C calculator in a collectors edition, reviving a beloved tool for engineers and enthusiasts. The revival nods to enduring interest in vintage hardware and precise numerical workflows.
items.summary_zh: HP 重新推出经典的 HP-16C 计算器收藏版，重现了这款长期受工程师和爱好者欢迎的工具。复刻体现了对传统硬件与精确数值工作流的持续热爱。

items.title_en: Stop Ruining It
items.title_zh: 别把好事毁了
items.summary_en: A concise admonition against feature creep and over-engineering; advocates preserving core value, user experience, and focus.
items.summary_zh: 作者呼吁避免功能膨胀和过度设计，强调要保留核心价值与良好用户体验，专注于真正重要的改进。

items.title_en: Capstone – multi-platform, multi-architecture disassembly framework
items.title_zh: Capstone：跨平台、跨体系结构的反汇编框架
items.summary_en: Capstone is a multi-platform, multi-architecture disassembly framework used by researchers and security engineers. Its cross-architecture support simplifies binary analysis pipelines and enables tooling across heterogeneous targets.
items.summary_zh: Capstone 是一个跨平台、支持多架构的反汇编框架，被广泛用于逆向工程和二进制分析。新版持续扩展对不同处理器与平台的支持，提升分析流程的稳定性与灵活性。

items.title_en: REST3D: Reconstructing Physically Stable 3D Scenes from a Single Image
items.title_zh: REST3D：从单幅图像重建物理稳定的三维场景
items.summary_en: REST3D proposes reconstructing physically stable 3D scenes from a single image, blending computer vision with physical plausibility. This could improve AR/VR, robotics perception, and scene understanding with limited data.
items.summary_zh: REST3D 提出基于单张图片重建物理稳定的三维场景，将计算机视觉与物理一致性结合，为在有限数据下的 AR/VR、机器人感知与场景理解带来潜在提升。

items.title_en: Show HN: Eyeball
items.title_zh: Show HN：Eyeball
items.summary_en: Show HN: Eyeball
items.summary_zh: Show HN：Eyeball

items.title_en: Preparing for KDE Plasma's Last X11-Supported Release
items.title_zh: 为 KDE Plasma 的最后一个支持 X11 的版本做准备
items.summary_en: KDE Plasma is approaching its final release that supports X11; users and developers should prepare for the transition to Wayland, including app compatibility and workflow changes.
items.summary_zh: KDE Plasma 将迎来最后一个支持 X11 的版本，用户和开发者需为向 Wayland 的迁移做准备，关注应用兼容性和工作流的改变。

items.title_en: Open Repair Data Standard
items.title_zh: 开放修复数据标准 – Open Repair联盟
items.summary_en: Open Repair Data Standard, released by the Open Repair Alliance, standardizes repair information to improve data interoperability across products and platforms. This aims to empower consumers and repair businesses while nudging manufacturers toward transparency.
items.summary_zh: Open Repair Data Standard 由 Open Repair 联盟发布，统一了维修信息的标准，以提高跨产品、跨平台的数据互操作性。该标准有助于提升消费者和维修商的能力，也推动厂商在透明度方面的改进。

items.title_en: 4K years ago, Mohenjo-daro grew more equal over time
items.title_zh: 莫亨佐-达城在漫长历史中逐渐趋向平等
items.summary_en: Archaeology suggests Mohenjo-daro grew more egalitarian over time, challenging notions of rigid ancient hierarchies. The study uses material culture and housing data to illustrate social dynamics in an urban center.
items.summary_zh: 考古学新证据表明莫亨佐-达城在漫长历史中逐渐趋向平等，挑战了对古代等级社会的刻板印象。研究基于居住分布与文物证据等，揭示了城市社会的动力。

items.title_en: Fidonet: Technology, Use, Tools, and History (1993)
items.title_zh: Fidonet：1993年的技术、用法、工具与历史
items.summary_en: A 1993 overview of Fidonet, outlining its technology, typical tools, and user practices that powered early distributed bulletin-board networks. The document situates Fidonet in the pre-internet era as a grassroots, asynchronous communication backbone for hobbyists and regional networks.
items.summary_zh: 这份1993年的资料回顾了 Fidonet 的技术架构、常用工具与使用习惯，揭示其如何支撑早期分布式的电子公告网络。它将 Fidonet 放在互联网兴起前的社区型、异步通信网络背景中，强调业余者和地区网络的作用。

items.title_en: How we index images for RAG
items.title_zh: 我们如何为 RAG 索引图像
items.summary_en: A deep dive into image indexing for Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) reveals practical strategies for embedding, similarity search, and multi-modal retrieval to speed up accurate visual retrieval in AI chats.
items.summary_zh: 深入探讨用于检索增强生成（RAG）的图像索引，揭示嵌入、相似性搜索和多模态检索等实用策略，以提升在 AI 聊天中对视觉信息的准确检索速度。

items.title_en: A Visual Guide to Gemma 4 12B
items.title_zh: Gemma 4 12B 的可视化指南
items.summary_en: Gemma 4 12B is a 12B-parameter model. A visual guide explains its architecture, training data, capabilities, and limitations using diagrams and charts. It helps readers understand how the model behaves and highlights safety and deployment considerations.
items.summary_zh: Gemma 4 12B 是一个 12B 参数的模型，可视化指南通过图示解释其架构、训练数据、能力与局限性，便于读者理解模型的工作机制。内容有助于评估其安全性与落地应用时的风险点。

items.title_en: Show HN: Tired of duct-taping access control into agent prompts. Here's the fix
items.title_zh: Show HN：Tired of duct-taping access control into agent prompts. Here's the fix
items.summary_en: Show HN presents cast, a library to separate access control from agent prompts, addressing a common security pain point in AI workflows. It offers a principled approach to gating actions without bogging prompts down.
items.summary_zh: Show HN 展示 cast，这是一种将访问控制与代理提示分离的库，解决 AI 工作流中常见的安全痛点，提供对动作授权的分层、清晰实现路径。

items.title_en: Bringing Up DeepSeek-V4-Flash on AMD MI300X
items.title_zh: 在 AMD MI300X 上启用 DeepSeek-V4-Flash
items.summary_en: Bringing DeepSeek-V4-Flash to AMD MI300X demonstrates compatibility and potential performance gains for AI workloads on next-generation accelerators. The port signals ongoing optimization of AI pipelines on new hardware.
items.summary_zh: 在 AMD MI300X 上移植 DeepSeek-V4-Flash 表明该硬件对 AI 工作负载的兼容性与潜在性能提升，展现 AI 流水线在新一代加速器上的持续优化。

items.title_en: Self-hosted dev sandboxes with preview URLs (Docker, Go, no K8s)
items.title_zh: 无需 K8s 的本地开发沙箱：Docker 与 Go 实现可预览 URL
items.summary_en: A project delivering self-hosted dev sandboxes using Docker and Go, offering ephemeral preview URLs without Kubernetes. This simplifies local development, reduces cloud dependencies, and enables easy sharing of build previews with teammates.
items.summary_zh: 该项目提供基于 Docker 和 Go 的自托管开发沙箱，支持无 Kubernetes 的临时预览 URL，简化本地开发、减少云依赖，并便于与团队共享构建预览。

items.title_en: QBE – Compiler Backend – 1.3
items.title_zh: QBE 编译器后端 1.3
items.summary_en: QBE 1.3 ships with new backends and optimizations, reinforcing its role as a fast, retargetable compiler framework. The update lowers barriers for building tooling and experimenting with new architectures.
items.summary_zh: QBE 1.3 推出新的后端与优化，巩固其作为高效、可重新定向的编译器框架的地位。此次更新降低了构建工具和尝试新架构的门槛。

items.title_en: CSS-Native Parallax Effect
items.title_zh: CSS 原生视差效果
items.summary_en: A CSS-native parallax effect achieves depth using only CSS properties—translate, perspective, and scroll-driven features—without JavaScript. The approach can deliver smoother, more accessible animations with fewer runtime costs, but requires careful cross-browser testing. The post likely showcases practical patterns and pitfalls.
items.summary_zh: 原生 CSS 的视差效果仅靠 CSS 属性（如 transform、perspective 和滚动相关特性）实现纵向深度感，无需 JavaScript。此做法在减少运行成本的同时可能提升可访问性与流畅性，但需要仔细进行跨浏览器测试。文中给出实用的实现模式与要点。

items.title_en: Show HN: Live breath detection and biofeedback from a phone microphone
items.title_zh: Show HN：用手机麦克风进行实时呼吸检测与生物反馈
items.summary_en: Live breath detection and biofeedback from a phone mic demonstrate a lightweight, real-time wellness tool that guides breathing exercises and physiological awareness. The project shows how accessible audio processing and ML can be made mobile-friendly.
items.summary_zh: 一个运行在手机麦克风上的实时呼吸检测与生物反馈系统，展示了在移动设备上实现低成本健康监测和呼吸训练的可行性。该项目体现了利用移动端音频处理和机器学习的可访问性。

items.title_en: Japan declines to join movement to ban youth from social media
items.title_zh: Japan declines to join movement to ban youth from social media
items.summary_en: Japan declines to join a movement to ban youth from social media, citing concerns over freedom of expression and enforceability. The decision reflects ongoing tensions around youth online access and platform governance. It signals a cautious stance on hard bans and governance interventions.
items.summary_zh: 日本拒绝加入全球限制未成年人社媒的行动，强调言论自由与执行可行性问题。这一决定反映了关于未成年人上网与平台治理的持续博弈。

items.title_en: Muxcard, a DIY credit card size computer
items.title_zh: Muxcard：一个自制的信用卡大小计算机
items.summary_en: Muxcard is a DIY, credit-card-sized computer project that aims to be a portable, hackable development board. It emphasizes compact form factor while offering entry-level tooling and expandability for hobbyists. The project fits into the ongoing trend of pocketable computing devices for learning and prototype hardware.
items.summary_zh: Muxcard 是一个自制的信用卡大小的计算机项目，旨在提供便携且可黑客化的开发板。其在紧凑体积的同时提供入门级的工具链与扩展性，面向爱好者进行学习与原型开发。这一设计体现了便携计算设备的持续热潮。

items.title_en: Recovering Eric Graham's 1987 Amiga Juggler raytracer source code
items.title_zh: Recovering Eric Graham's 1987 Amiga Juggler raytracer source code
items.summary_en: Recovering Eric Graham's 1987 Amiga Juggler raytracer source code sheds light on early raytracing techniques and the Amiga era's demoscene culture. The rediscovery preserves a slice of computing history and offers insights into retro graphics. A reminder of preservation's value.
items.summary_zh: 恢复 Eric Graham 1987 年的 Amiga Juggler 光线追踪器源代码，为早期光线追踪技术和 Amiga 时代的 Demoscene 留存一页历史，并提供对复古图形的洞见。

items.title_en: Build 2026: WSL improvements and the new Containers CLI and APIs
items.title_zh: Build 2026: WSL improvements and the new Containers CLI and APIs
items.summary_en: Build 2026 highlights WSL improvements and introduces new Containers CLI and APIs to streamline running Linux containers on Windows. The updates aim to unify tooling, improve performance, and simplify development workflows across Windows and Linux boundaries.
items.summary_zh: Build 2026 展示了对 WSL 的改进，以及新的 Containers CLI 与 API，旨在让在 Windows 上运行 Linux 容器的开发工作流更加统一和高效。

items.title_en: Show HN: I reverse-engineered the world maps of Test Drive III (1990 DOS game)
items.title_zh: Show HN：我逆向还原了 1990 年 DOS 游戏 Test Drive III 的世界地图
items.summary_en: I reverse-engineered the world maps of Test Drive III (1990 DOS game) to produce a machine-readable map dataset. The work reveals how classic games encoded level layouts and provides a model for preserving and exploring old software.
items.summary_zh: 我逆向还原了 1990 年 DOS 游戏 Test Drive III 的世界地图，生成了可机器读取的地图数据。这项工作揭示了经典游戏如何对关卡布局进行编码，并为保存与再现老游戏提供了有价值的参考。

items.title_en: Squillions: How money laundering won
items.title_zh: Squillions：洗钱之所以取胜的原因
items.summary_en: A long-form investigation into money laundering, tracing how illicit funds move through opaque financial systems and the political economy behind enforcement gaps.
items.summary_zh: 对洗钱的规模和运作进行长篇调查，追踪不法资金如何在不透明的金融体系中流动，以及执法缺口背后的经济逻辑。

items.title_en: Stop Killing Games
items.title_zh: 停止扼杀游戏体验
items.summary_en: A manifesto arguing for game designs that respect player agency and long-term engagement rather than hollow trends that kill the game's vitality.
items.summary_zh: 一本呼吁回归玩家主导、注重长期体验的游戏设计宣言，拒绝削弱玩家体验的商业做法或强制性机制。

items.title_en: Nabokov's pale fire: the lost 'father of all hypertext demos'? (2011)
items.title_zh: Nabokov 的《盎然之火》：2011 年失落的“所有超文本演示之父”？
items.summary_en: An exploration of Nabokov's Pale Fire and its status as a potential early hypertext demonstration, offering a historical lens on the evolution of nonlinear writing and digital literature. The piece contextualizes how early experiments foreshadow modern hypertext and interfaces.
items.summary_zh: 本文探讨《盎然之火》在超文本历史中的地位，作为早期超文本演示的候选之一。通过历史视角理解非线性叙事与数字文学的演变。

items.title_en: How turkey hacked the hair-transplant industry
items.title_zh: 土耳其如何改变了植发行业
items.summary_en: Wired dives into how Turkey became a hub for hair transplants, examining medical tourism, business models, and regulatory gaps enabled by outsourcing and technology.
items.summary_zh: Wired 深入报道土耳其如何成为植发行业的全球中心，分析医疗旅游、商业模式与监管缺口，以及外包与技术如何推动行业扩张。

items.title_en: GoPro warned it may not survive
items.title_zh: GoPro 警告称可能难以存续
items.summary_en: GoPro issued a warning about its going-concern status, citing financial strain and strategic challenges; the company may need to pivot away from core products or invest in new bets like AI memory or services. The note underscores the volatility in hardware startups and the risk of extinction if cash burn persists.
items.summary_zh: GoPro 发布进入持续经营存疑的警告，称财务压力与战略挑战可能威胁其生存。若现金消耗居高不下，公司或需调整路线、寻求新业务方向，此事凸显硬件初创公司在不确定市场中的风险。

items.title_en: OpenFOV – Webcam head tracking for iRacing
items.title_zh: OpenFOV：用于 iRacing 的 Webcam 头部追踪
items.summary_en: OpenFOV enables webcam-based head tracking for iRacing, offering a low-cost alternative to dedicated hardware. The project demonstrates accessible, open-source improvements to sim racing ergonomics.
items.summary_zh: OpenFOV 通过网络摄像头实现 iRacing 的头部跟踪，为模拟赛车提供廉价且开放源代码的改进方案，提升沉浸感与操控体验。

items.title_en: Multicore suppport for DOS is real – partly
items.title_zh: Multicore 支持 DOS 真实存在 – 部分实现
items.summary_en: The DOS ecosystem shows partial multicore support, with experiments around emulation and OS-level multithreading. Realistic multithreading on classic DOS remains limited but shows progress for enthusiasts and retrocomputing projects.
items.summary_zh: DOS 生态圈在多核方面取得部分实现，涉及仿真和操作系统级多线程的实验。尽管在经典 DOS 上实现真正的多线程仍有限，但对爱好者和边缘计算项目有一定进展。

items.title_en: Words of Type
items.title_zh: 字体的语言
items.summary_en: Words of Type provides a deep dive into typography, fonts, and typographic design. It curates concepts in typography, fonts, and layout; it's a resource for designers and typographers.
items.summary_zh: 这是一个关于字体排版的资料集合，涵盖排版史、字体设计与排版理论，为设计师提供实践与美学上的洞见。

items.title_en: DIY Bipedal Robot Used Pneumatic "Air-Muscles" Instead of Motors
items.title_zh: DIY Bipedal Robot Used Pneumatic "Air-Muscles" Instead of Motors
items.summary_en: A DIY bipedal humanoid robot uses pneumatic air muscles instead of electric motors, trading precise torque for compliant, responsive motion. The project outlines hardware design and control challenges, offering a look at alternative actuation approaches in robotics. A fascinating take on soft robotics in practice.
items.summary_zh: 这款自制双足机器人采用气动“空气肌肉”替代电动机驱动，强调柔顺性和响应性。文中介绍了机械设计与控制难点，展示了机器人驱动的另外一种可行路径。

items.title_en: Fluid Simulation for Dummies (2006)
items.title_zh: 面向初学者的流体仿真
items.summary_en: A beginner-friendly primer on fluid simulation introduces core concepts and approachable examples, demystifying Navier-Stokes-inspired methods for hobbyists and students. It helps readers understand the practical trade-offs and common pitfalls in simulating fluids in code.
items.summary_zh: 这篇面向初学者的流体仿真入门教程，揭示了核心概念并用友好示例讲解。帮助读者理解在代码中实现流体仿真时的实际权衡与常见陷阱。

items.title_en: Loading Sega Games Off a Vinyl Record [video]
items.title_zh: 通过黑胶唱片加载世嘉游戏的演示视频
items.summary_en: A video demonstrates loading Sega games from a vinyl record data encoding, blending analog media with digital games. The stunt illustrates creative data encoding and the longevity of physical media for experimentation.
items.summary_zh: 视频展示了通过黑胶唱片中的数据编码加载世嘉游戏的实验，将模拟介质与数字游戏数据进行有趣的融合。

items.title_en: Writing Portable ARM64 Assembly (2023)
items.title_zh: Writing Portable ARM64 Assembly (2023)
items.summary_en: Writing Portable ARM64 Assembly (2023) explores how to craft ARM64 assembly that stays portable across Apple, Android, and Linux ecosystems. It covers ABI conventions, calling conventions, and pragmatic patterns to maintain compatibility on multiple platforms. A practical guide for low-level cross-platform code.
items.summary_zh: 《Writing Portable ARM64 Assembly (2023)》探讨如何编写在 Apple、Android、Linux 等平台间可移植的 ARM64 汇编。内容涵盖 ABI 与调用约定，以及在不同体系结构上保持兼容性的实用模式。

items.title_en: Thomas Mann: Goethe Heartened by Panama (As Suez for English, or Danube-Rhine)
items.title_zh: 托马斯·曼：巴拿马让歌德感到欣慰（如同苏伊士对英语，或多瑙-莱茵之路）
items.summary_en: A literary reflection invoking Goethe to explore Panama, drawing parallels with Suez and Danube–Rhine routes to discuss cultural exchange and engineering feats.
items.summary_zh: 一篇文学反思，借用歌德的视角探讨巴拿马运河，并将其与苏伊士、但得-莱茵之路进行比较，讨论文化交流与工程成就。

items.title_en: Sixteen Kids and a Hit Man (2024)
items.title_zh: 16个孩子和一个杀手（2024）
items.summary_en: A 2024 FBI dark-web murder-for-hire case details the operations of a hitman and the networks facilitating such crimes, illustrating the cybersecurity, law enforcement, and digital-forensics angles of modern crime.
items.summary_zh: 报道 2024 年 FBI 调查的暗网雇凶案，揭示作案网络与数字取证、网络安全与执法协作等现代犯罪的要素。

items.title_en: SaySynth: A Brief History of Speaking Machines
items.title_zh: SaySynth: A Brief History of Speaking Machines
items.summary_en: SaySynth traces the history of speaking machines from early mechanical devices to modern neural TTS, highlighting milestones and how vocal interfaces reshaped human-computer interaction. The piece connects technological milestones to evolving user experiences.
items.summary_zh: SaySynth 追溯了从早期机械设备到现代神经网络文本转语音的语音技术史，强调里程碑事件及语音界面对人机交互的重塑。

items.title_en: Jonathan Franzen on Talent, Theatre, and His Next Novel
items.title_zh: Jonathan Franzen on Talent, Theatre, and His Next Novel
items.summary_en: Jonathan Franzen discusses talent, theatre, and his forthcoming novel in a candid interview, offering reflections on the craft of writing and the pressures of modern literary culture. The piece blends literary insight with a glimpse into an author navigating fame and creative process.
items.summary_zh: 乔纳森·弗兰岑在访谈中谈及才华、戏剧性及他即将出版的新作，揭示写作技艺的真实挑战与当代文学环境的压力。

items.title_en: Show HN: Phive, a Gomoku-like game to play with friends or solo
items.title_zh: Show HN: Phive, a Gomoku-like game to play with friends or solo
items.summary_en: Phive is a Gomoku-like game that supports online multiplayer or solo play, offering a lightweight, accessible browser game for casual matches or strategy practice. It emphasizes quick play and broad accessibility for quick gaming sessions.
items.summary_zh: Phive 是一款 Gomoku 式棋类游戏，支持与朋友在线对战或单人练习，提供轻量级、易上手的浏览器对战体验。

items.title_en: OpenRidingController – DIY horse riding controller for the PC
items.title_zh: OpenRidingController – DIY horse riding controller for the PC
items.summary_en: OpenRidingController is a DIY PC game controller that simulates horse riding using custom hardware. It offers a hands-on interface for horse riding games, illustrating how hobbyists build niche input devices for immersive experiences. A compelling example of bespoke hardware for gaming.
items.summary_zh: OpenRidingController 是一个自制的 PC 骑马控制器项目，利用自定义硬件模拟骑马动作。该方案展示了业余爱好者如何为沉浸式游戏打造专用输入设备。
